timeline.note: Added trpc, hono, drizzle, prisma. First real findings.
Added express, fastify, vite, supabase-js. eval() pattern suppressed (89% test-only).
Added n8n, vercel/ai, langchain, esbuild, etc. hardcoded_ip suppressed (86% test-only).
Added koa, nestjs, vue, preact, solid, webpack. System stabilizing.

insights.insight: eval() appears in 89% test files. Real production eval is rare and critical. Corpus suppresses test-only eval.
0.0.0.0 binding is 86% in test configurations. Only flag in production server files.
Most common real issue. 59% in production code. Cannot suppress -- genuine security concern.
Authentication disabled in 80% test suites. Flag only in route handlers and middleware.
CORS * is 70% intentional in dev/test. Flag in production config files only.

summary.note: Corpus reduces noise by 45% compared to a static scanner by learning which patterns are test-only.
